articles.title: CME ADDS CARDANO, CHAINLINK, AND STELLAR FUTURES TO DERIVATIVES SUITE
articles.summary: CME Group will list futures (standard and micro contracts) for Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar starting February 9 to broaden its regulated crypto derivatives offering beyond Bitcoin, Ether, XRP, and Solana. Clients are looking for trusted products to manage price risk, even as overall crypto derivatives volumes cooled into year-end. The move also ties into CME's longer-term push toward “always-on” continuous trading for round-the-clock global markets.

articles.title: GENERIC LAUNCHES GUSD: A PRIVATE, YIELD-ROUTING META-STABLECOIN
articles.summary: GUSD is the first natively private stablecoin built on Morpho. It is a meta-stablecoin that aggregates dollar assets like USDC, USDT, and USDS, offers opt-in privacy, is non-custodial, and routes onchain yield back to the distribution layer (applications, networks, and end users) rather than to an issuer. GUSD will have risk and deployment support from Steakhouse Financial. Its early partners include LayerZero, Aragon, Status, and Tempo.

articles.title: INGENICO PARTNERS WITH WALLETCONNECT PAY
articles.summary: Payment terminal giant Ingenico has integrated WalletConnect Pay to enable crypto payments at physical retail locations through its existing POS infrastructure. The partnership allows merchants using Ingenico terminals to accept stablecoin payments without additional hardware or significant integration work. This marks a significant expansion of crypto payment rails into traditional retail, leveraging Ingenico's global network of 40M+ payment terminals.

articles.title: CELESTIA VISION 2.0: EVERY MARKET ONCHAIN
articles.summary: Celestia's Vision 2.0 pivots the data availability layer's mission toward enabling high-volume financial markets to operate entirely onchain. The roadmap targets blockspace products capable of supporting trading volumes comparable to traditional exchanges, requiring 10-100x improvements in throughput and latency. Celestia aims to become the settlement layer for a new generation of onchain order books and derivatives markets currently constrained by blockchain performance limitations.

articles.title: THE DECENTRALIZED RENAISSANCE
articles.summary: The original 2014 Web3 vision of permissionless decentralized applications is now achievable due to infrastructure maturation. Fileverse, a decentralized Google Docs alternative, is evidence that dApps have reached usability parity with Web2 as it passes the “walkaway test,” where users can retrieve data even if the company disappears. 2026 will be an inflection point where the technical prerequisites for competing with centralized platforms are finally in place.

articles.title: WHY OPEN NETWORKS WIN
articles.summary: History's greatest breakthroughs came not from new inventions but from removing friction, and open networks like blockchain represent the next major friction reduction. Permissionless systems lower barriers to participation and enable innovation at the edges without gatekeepers. Crypto's value proposition isn't speculation but fundamentally restructuring how economic coordination happens at scale.

articles.title: INSIDE THE FIRST AUTONOMOUS AGENT ECONOMY ON SOLANA
articles.summary: t54.ai has launched what it claims is the first fully autonomous agent economy on Solana, where AI agents independently transact, negotiate, and allocate resources using the x402 protocol infrastructure. Drawing lessons from Microsoft Research's Magentic Marketplace and Stanford HAI's agent society experiments, the system enables agents to discover services, execute payments, and form emergent market structures without human intervention. The project explores economic coordination between AI systems using blockchain as the trust and settlement layer.

articles.title: INTRODUCING $GWEI: ETHGAS GOVERNANCE TOKEN
articles.summary: $GWEI is the governance token for ETHGas' real-time Ethereum gas optimization protocol. It enables holders to vote on fee distribution mechanisms and protocol upgrades. The token captures value from the platform's gas prediction and bundling services. Stakers earn a portion of protocol fees. $GWEI is essential infrastructure for MEV protection and transaction cost optimization.

articles.title: A YEAR IN BERA - BERACHAIN EOY UPDATE
articles.summary: Berachain's end-of-year retrospective highlights its mainnet launch, novel Proof of Liquidity consensus mechanism adoption, and ecosystem growth across DeFi protocols built on the chain.

articles.title: BITMINE BETS $200M ON MRBEAST'S BEAST INDUSTRIES
ETHEREUM HITS NEW ALL-TIME HIGH IN DAILY TRANSACTIONS
articles.summary: Ethereum processed a record 2,595,176 transactions in a single day, marking a new all-time high and signaling accelerating onchain demand.

articles.title: USDC SUPPLY GROWTH TILTS TOWARD POLYGON
articles.summary: Polygon recorded the largest percentage increase in USDC supply since late November, outpacing other major chains.
